label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out what the date one week from the last day of 1899 would be. First, the last day of 1899 is December 31, 1899. If we add one week to that date, we're adding seven days. So, December 31, 1899 plus one day is January 1, 1900. Then I need to add the remaining six days. Adding six days to January 1, 1900, would bring us to January 7, 1900. Looking at the options provided, (D) is 01/07/1900. Let
